About This Section

This section was created entirely by Claude — Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 model (claude-fable-5) acting as orchestrator, dispatching the strava-data-analyst, strava-creativity, strava-viz-design, strava-developer, and strava-qa subagents. Every analysis, statistical test, and line of code below was produced autonomously.
